title: AI SEO Page Generator | The Marketing Specialists
metaDescription: Generate structured JSON drafts for SEO guides, service pages, city pages, and industry pages using AI.
heroText: Generate structured JSON drafts for guide, service, city, and industry pages using your keyword focus, search intent, and CTA strategy.
toolIntro: This tool generates JSON drafts for your Cloudflare SEO system. It is designed to create richer page content into your content data structure, not raw HTML.

supportItems.title: Faster page creation
supportItems.text: Generate structured drafts for multiple page types without starting from a blank page every time.

supportItems.title: Better content consistency
supportItems.text: Keep titles, meta descriptions, sections, FAQs, CTAs, and schema-ready fields aligned across your system.

supportItems.title: Built for scale
supportItems.text: This creates draft content in the same structure your Cloudflare publishing engine already understands.

ctaPanel.headline: Need Strategy Behind the Content?
ctaPanel.text: Use your content system together with a smarter digital marketing strategy.

faqs.question: Does this publish pages automatically?
faqs.answer: Not yet. This stage generates structured JSON drafts that fit your publishing system. Auto-saving and publishing can come next.

faqs.question: Can this generate different page types?
faqs.answer: Yes. This generator is built to create guides, service pages, city pages, and industry pages.

faqs.question: Will this use the project’s SEO rules?
faqs.answer: Yes. The generation prompt is shaped around your SEO structure, page data model, and conversion-focused content goals.
